query:
-- Add explore/discovery columns to influencerPersonalities
ALTER TABLE influencerPersonalities 
ADD COLUMN isPublic BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN likeCount INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN category VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN style VARCHAR(100);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dtffFtxzpGHwBQ5.0a644b1e7093 --database DtHx6xuQiQvSJ7iXUMCHPD --execute 
-- Add explore/discovery columns to influencerPersonalities
ALTER TABLE influencerPersonalities 
ADD COLUMN isPublic BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN likeCount INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN category VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN style VARCHAR(100);
